title: Morning Pastries
scene: 你在社区面包店买早餐。

turns.cn: 早上好！今天可颂刚出炉。
turns.en: Good morning! Croissants just came out of the oven.

turns.cn: 两个可颂、一杯拿铁带走。
turns.en: Two croissants and a latte to go, please.

turns.cn: 要加热吗？蓝莓马芬也新鲜。
turns.en: Want them warmed? Blueberry muffins are fresh too.
Warm the croissants. I'll take one muffin.
Twelve fifty total.
Do you have a loyalty card?
Yes. Buy ten, get one loaf free.

title: Custom Birthday Cake
scene: 你在面包店订制孩子生日蛋糕。

turns.en: What size? How many people?

turns.cn: 八寸，十二个人，巧克力味。
turns.en: Eight inch for twelve people, chocolate flavor.
Any message on top? Pick up Saturday afternoon?

turns.cn: 写 Happy 8th Birthday Lily，两点取。
turns.en: Happy eighth birthday Lily. Pick up at two PM.

turns.cn: 水果夹心还是奶油？定金二十。
turns.en: Fruit filling or buttercream? Twenty-dollar deposit.
Strawberry filling. I'll put the deposit on my card.
We'll text a photo when it's done.

title: Gluten-Free Options
scene: 你对麸质过敏，在面包店询问选项。

turns.cn: 有无麸质的面包？我对小麦过敏。
turns.en: Do you have gluten-free bread? I'm allergic to wheat.

turns.cn: 有，单独烤箱烤，在冷柜那边。
turns.en: Yes, baked in a separate oven. They're in the cooler.

turns.cn: 会跟普通面包交叉污染吗？
turns.en: Any cross-contamination with regular bread?

turns.cn: 切面包用不同刀和板，员工会说明。
turns.en: Different knives and boards. Staff can walk you through it.

turns.cn: 我拿一条酸面包和两个布朗尼。
turns.en: I'll take one sourdough loaf and two brownies.

turns.cn: 布朗尼也无麸质，一共十六。
turns.en: Brownies are gluten-free too. Sixteen total.
Thanks for explaining.

title: Bread Slicing
scene: 你买一条刚出炉的乡村面包。

turns.en: This loaf is still warm. Want it sliced?
Thick slices, please. And a baguette.

turns.cn: 法棍下午三点出炉，要预留吗？
turns.en: Baguettes come out at three PM. Should I set one aside?
Yes, hold one. I'll pick up at four.
Paper bag or canvas tote?
Paper is fine.
The country loaf is seven fifty.
